description: Hermes-like agent that builds a source-backed knowledgebase for top 100 U.S. universities, their majors, and applicant expectations.
next_steps: Raise majors coverage from 99/100 to full top-100 coverage by resolving Baylor's remaining official-source access blockers

Find a Baylor source path that is both official and accessible in this environment; the admissions/go pages were Cloudflare-blocked here and the undergraduate catalog root returned an empty 202 response during this audit
Improve faculty verification to use official school pages instead of RateMyProfessors-derived fallbacks where possible
Improve alumni recency and per-major filtering in the generic enrichment pipeline
